subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Thanks were rendered at the Divine Threshold that, praise be unto God, the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید شکرانه بدرگاه الهی گردید که الحمد لله یاران
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love of God
